notes: Only encountered a couple minor graphical and audio glitches. Otherwise works perfectly.
title: Turbo Dismount™

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 with Max-Q Design
notes: Just click play and enjoy. Played a bit and could not find any bug.
title: Turbo Dismount™

notes: Controller works once manually set to "controller on." Flawless otherwise. Custom logos (windowed mode recommended when first setting custom logos) and Steam Workshop levels just work.
title: Turbo Dismount™

notes: D9VK as of the recent "fixed function" implementations now works with the game! Recommended way to try D9VK is to let the current Proton create the initial prefix, then upgrade to Proton-4.11-GE-1 with the installation instructions from GloriousEggroll's Github.
title: Turbo Dismount™

notes: D9VK bundled with Proton 4.11 now correctly renders effects like fog and haze with Proton 4.11-3. Enable by entering the launch option "PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%"
title: Turbo Dismount™
